MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivial Leung Lerche, Esq. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. An email was received requesting to take the matter off-calendar since the case has settled. The Court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Off-calendar per request of the Moving party and approval of the Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
